title: DEKTON Filling Knife 80mm, 1.27mm - Stainless Steel Flexible Blade with Ergonomic Rubber Grip Handle for Filling Cracks, Repairing Holes & Decorating Tasks
features: Multi-Purpose Filling Tool:Designed for applying filler, smoothing cracks, repairing holes, and handling general decorating tasks. Ideal for DIY projects and professional use on walls, ceilings, and surfaces.
Durable Stainless Steel Blade: Heavy-duty blade offers strength and reliability for smooth application and scraping, crafted to withstand everyday use and provide long-lasting performance.
Ergonomic Rubber Grip Handle:Features a non-slip, comfortable grip that reduces hand fatigue and improves control, making it easier to achieve precise results during extended use.
Smooth & Precise Application:Flexible blade allows for even spreading of filler or putty, ensuring a neat and professional finish while reducing the risk of uneven surfaces.
Available in Multiple Sizes:Choose from 40mm, 60mm, 80mm, or 100mm widths, giving you the right size knife for detailed crack filling, larger repair areas, or wider decorating tasks.
description: The DEKTON Filling Knife is a practical and reliable tool for a wide range of decorating and repair tasks. Ideal for applying filler, smoothing cracks, repairing holes, and preparing surfaces, it is designed to deliver a clean and professional finish. The 1.27mm stainless steel blade offers the perfect balance of strength and flexibility, allowing for even spreading of filler while built to withstand regular use for long-lasting durability. The ergonomic rubber grip handle ensures comfort and control, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Available in multiple sizes: 40mm, 60mm, 80mm, and 100mm: this filling knife is suitable for both small detailed repairs and larger surface work. Whether you are a DIY enthusiast or a professional tradesperson, the DEKTON Filling Knife is a versatile addition to any toolkit.
